name: The Fertilisers And Chemicals Travancore Limited
summary: The Fertilisers And Chemicals Travancore Limited manufactures and markets fertilizers in India. It operates through Fertiliser and Petrochemical segments. The company offers complex fertilizers, including ammonium phosphate sulphate and zincated factamfos; straight fertilizers, such as ammonium sulphate; organic fertilizers; bio-fertilizers comprising azospirillum, rhizobium, and phosphate solubilizing bacteria; and bagged gypsum. It also provides caprolactam for use in manufacturing nylon tyre cords, nylon filament yarns, engineering plastics, etc.; and by-products comprising carbon dioxide, gypsum, and sulphuric acid. It also imports fertilizers; and offers various services for farmers. In addition, the company engages in the engineering consultancy, design and fabrication, and erection of industrial equipment. The Fertilisers And Chemicals Travancore Limited was founded in 1943 and is based in Kochi, India.
